long_description:
The cosaction delete command should be executed from the deployer, and snapshot labelling should be done from the jumpod.

There are 2 accounts which have snapshot stuck in deleting.

 - 1431ea2a7958ad20f0fee592ff85f746
    1. r018-9cb20573-1fd5-474e-b536-c02469fd6772
         kubectl label snap -n 1431ea2a7958ad20f0fee592ff85f746 r018-9cb20573-1fd5-474e-b536-c02469fd6772 "foo=bar"

Incident source: https://ibm-iaas.atlassian.net/browse/SNAP-6095 - VARSHINI J M
short_description: Cleanup the snapshots stuck in pending deleting in LON region
close_notes:
Issue Summary: Incident INC10475742 is related to cleaning up snapshots stuck in pending deleting in the LON region.
SME Findings: The incident is caused by snapshots stuck in deleting, and the runbook link provided in the incident description outlines the steps to troubleshoot and resolve the issue.
Reason of Escalation: The reason for escalation is not explicitly stated, but it appears that the issue was escalated due to the snapshots being stuck in deleting, which may be causing disruptions or issues with the service.
Resolution Steps: The resolution steps are outlined in the runbook link provided in the incident description, which includes steps 6 and 7.
Signature of Issue: The signature of the issue is "Cleanup the snapshots stuck in pending deleting in LON region".
Jira/Github/Other Tickets: The incident is related to Jira ticket SNAP-6095.
Category/Subcategory: The category is "Infrastructure Services" and the subcategory is not specified.
Timeline Summary: The incident was created on 2025-12-04T13:52:13.000Z and is currently in the "In Progress" state.
Resolution Runbook: The resolution runbook is available at the provided link: https://pages.github.ibm.com/cloudlab/internal-docs/snapshot_stuck_deleting.html#troubleshooting-steps
Caused by Change/Incident: The incident was not caused by a change, but rather by snapshots stuck in deleting.
Warroom: Not specified.
Meeting URL: Not specified.
Outage Start: 2025-12-04T00:00:00.000Z
Outage End: Not specified, as the incident is still in progress.
current_status_next_steps:
This incident is to cleanup snapshots stuck in deleting, so no recovery steps are needed.  If it's successful then snapshots are cleaned up else no change in status quo

In the given runbook link follow step 6 and 7

 -- runbook link -- 
https://pages.github.ibm.com/cloudlab/internal-docs/snapshot_stuck_deleting.html#troubleshooting-steps

 -- runbook link --
